<!--
Commit subjects must be lowercase, carry a scope and stay within 72 characters.
See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Description

<!-- What changed and why. Keep it short. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick one. Append ! to the type for a breaking change. -->

- [ ] `feat` - New capability
- [ ] `fix` - Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` - Documentation change
- [ ] `refactor` - Internal change with no behaviour change
- [ ] `perf` - Performance improvement
- [ ] `test` - Test addition or fix
- [ ] `ci` - Workflow or automation change
- [ ] `build` - Build or dependency change
- [ ] `chore` - Maintenance

## Changes

<!-- One line per file. Say what changed and why, never the path alone. -->

-

## Testing

<!--
Paste real output. Never tick a check that was not run. Use N/A only when the
change cannot affect runtime, such as documentation.
-->

- [ ] `sh hooks/test-commit-msg.sh`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/check-diction.py`
- [ ] `node --check setup.mjs`

## Notes

<!-- Compatibility notes or follow-up work. Delete if empty. -->
